text:
This article is about the Fullmetal Alchemist anime episode. For the similarly named manga chapter, see Chapter 6: The Right Hand of Destruction.
Destruction's Right Hand is the 14th episode of the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series.

Synopsis

Ed and Al search for Doctor Marcoh, a fugitive State Alchemist who holds information the brothers desperately desire. Finding him could be less challenging than keeping him alive -- Scar is drawing near.

Episode Notes

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 6: The Right Hand of Destruction, Chapter 7: After the Rain and Chapter 8: The Road of Hope.
This is the first episode of the second season.
In the English dub of this episode, Robert McCollum substitutes for Phil Parsons as General Hakuro. Bizarrely, Parsons is still listed as his character, inferring that this replacement was a last minute decision.

See also
